consequence.description: A 3% tolerance that is too tight for volatile assets may miss valid double bottom patterns, while the same tolerance may be too loose for low-volatility assets, accepting false patterns as valid reversal signals and causing losses on failed breakouts

evidence_refs.summary: 706879f Derived from BD: BD-062

core.when: When implementing or refactoring realtime quote caching logic in data collection
core.action: Set realtime quote cache TTL to 10 minutes (600 seconds) exactly — this 10-minute boundary balances intraday price freshness against API rate limits

consequence.description: Reducing TTL below 10 minutes causes excessive API usage and potential rate limiting; increasing TTL above 10 minutes causes stale intraday data, leading to wrong trading decisions based on outdated prices

evidence_refs.summary: 706879f Derived from BD: BD-065

core.when: When implementing or refactoring rate limiting logic in data collection
core.action: Apply randomized jitter between 0.5x and 1.5x of base delay to rate-limited requests — do not use fixed delay or deterministic patterns

consequence.description: Without jitter, concurrent requests trigger at the same time causing thundering herd API failures; fixed delays create synchronized spikes that overwhelm downstream APIs

core.when: When implementing or refactoring name-to-code resolution logic in lookup stage
core.action: Follow the resolution sequence exactly: (1) code-like check first, (2) local STOCK_NAME_MAP second, (3) AkShare fetch last — do not reorder or skip steps

consequence.description: Skipping the code-like check forces unnecessary expensive AkShare API calls; skipping local map causes redundant API fetches; reversing order to AkShare-first causes failures when AkShare is down and wastes API quota

evidence_refs.summary: 706879f Derived from BD: BD-GAP-013

consequence.description: Relaxed validation causes cross-market code collision where a valid code from one market matches a different security in another market, leading to wrong stock selection and incorrect trading decisions
